action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate=0.646 (best) with strong performance on 7/10 envs but 0.0 on LockedRoom/Dynamic-Obstacles/MultiRoom after 100M steps; iter10 failed on continued training due to SB3 AttributeError (_logger missing after load when calling _update_learning_rate). Analysis: Bias sampling + FlatObs+MlpPolicy+PPO is learning transferable navigation/puzzle skills (DoorKey/KeyCorridor/Lava/etc near 1.0) but harder long-horizon tasks need more focused steps; ~36min left allows ~5M more steps safely (~19min at ~4400fps); direct optimizer lr update avoids SB3 internal logger bug. Decision: Fix continued training block in train.py (set optimizer lr directly, remove _update call), keep 5M steps/chunked logging/bias/eval, submit_eval immediately to track gains on remaining hard envs before time budget expires.
